rows.label: qev051515_MSG0001
rows.name:
It seems your opponent for the
finals was my grandpa's rival![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051515_MSG0002
rows.name:
He's won the Lars Martial Arts
Tournament multiple times, and he's
just an incredibly amazing guy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051515_MSG0003
rows.name:
That's why I wanted to fight him once,
but... Well, I'm sure you're stronger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051515_MSG0004
rows.name:
You absolutely have to win! And
prove that your strength is the
greatest in the universe![ST:wait ]
